title: kadsura philippinensis
intro: Kadsura philippinensis, also known as the Philippine kadsura or 'Mayana', is an evergreen climber plant native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kadsura philippinensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential interactions.
